# Tommy

Tommy developer documentation.

## Documentation

### Introduction

Path: `/introduction`

Tommy developer documentation.

Tommy Developer Documentation Tommy is a workforce and care management platform with mobile, web, API, and addon surfaces. This Sourcey site is currently focused on the MCP server reference. The MCP tab starts as a static contract placeholder and will be expanded as Tommy moves the Workforce Bot and related AI tooling onto a RubyLLM-backed MCP architecture.

## MCP Server

### tommy

Path: `/mcp`
Version: 0.1.0

Tommy workforce management MCP server. This reference is a placeholder for the RubyLLM and MCP switchover; tools, resources, and prompts will be populated from the Rails MCP registry.
